name: Remove duplicate title from SignUpForm
goal: Remove the title section from SignUpForm.tsx to avoid duplication with the parent page component.
summary: The user wants to remove the first title ('Create Account') from SignUpForm.tsx because it is already present in the parent signup/page.tsx. This will leave only the form fields visible within the component.
context_assumptions: The title in signup/page.tsx is sufficient for the page context.
Removing the header from SignUpForm.tsx will not break the form layout significantly.

files_to_modify.purpose: Remove the duplicate header section containing the h1 and p tags.

constraints: Ensure the form structure remains valid after removing the header.
acceptance_criteria: SignUpForm.tsx no longer contains the 'Create Account' h1 title.
The form fields and submit button remain functional and styled correctly.
The parent page.tsx title remains visible.
notes: The previous version of SignUpForm.tsx had a header div with h1 and p tags. This modification removes that entire div block.
